steps.title: Identify coefficients
steps.content: The quadratic is in standard form $$ax^2+bx+c=0$$ with $$a=1$$, $$b=-5$$, and $$c=-24$$.

steps.title: Apply Vieta's formula for sum
steps.content: By Vieta’s formula, the sum of the roots is $$-\frac{b}{a}$$ . Substituting gives $$-\frac{-5}{1}=5$$ . That matches choice D — D is correct.
